prompt: Promotional graphic showing 5 different UI theme variations of a dialogue box system side by side. From left to right: Dark theme (dark blue, gold accents), Fantasy theme (warm brown parchment), Sci-Fi theme (neon cyan on black), Bubblegum theme (bright pink pastels), Horror theme (blood red on black). Each shows the same dialogue text but with different styling. Modern promotional layout with the title '5 Built-In Themes' at the top. Clean, marketing material style. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio.
